original_image_tags: A brown cardboard folder cover, showing signs of age and wear. The folder has a vertical metal fastener (two prongs with a flat base) attached to a rectangular piece of brown tape or paper reinforcement on the left side. The fastener shows some tarnish. There are two punched holes near the bottom edge for a binder. The top edge is slightly tattered. A handwritten note is visible in pencil or light ink in the upper right quadrant.

elements.description: Back of a manila folder or page with a metal fastener at the top center, a strip of adhesive tape, two hole-punch holes at the bottom, and handwritten text in the top right corner that reads 'EMPTY 11-18-64 [illegible signature]'.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the main visual elements (manila folder/back, metal fastener, tape, two punched holes, handwritten text in top right), but B adds a specific verbatim text string that A does not read, without contradiction.
